payload.title: Port replay to Postgres, scoped by tenant
payload.description: Port replayInto + resolveDisplayNumbers + rekey handling to write tenant-scoped Postgres cache tables. SCP-110 de-collision logic ports unchanged (pure over the create-set). Golden test: same event fixture replayed through SQLite and Postgres yields byte-identical board state. Depends on the schema story. (From SCP-124.)
